/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/Utils/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/IO/BitBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/IO/FileHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/Core/LZ77Compressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/Core/HuffmanCompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/Core/CompressionEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hpc.dir/CLI/ArgumentParser.cpp.o -o bin/hpc
